safety_context.summary: The report is plausible but unsafe to act on without location and danger confirmation: {summary}

findings.claim: Scenario-local reports support that a physical hazard may be present.

source_notes.label: Scenario-local hazard reports
source_notes.note: Available signals include road, smoke, wire, or school-area hazard language.

findings.claim: The available reports do not by themselves confirm a safe volunteer route.

source_notes.label: Available scenario reports
source_notes.note: Reports describe hazards but do not confirm all safety-critical details.

questions_for_human_verification: Is anyone injured, trapped, or unable to leave?
Have local authorities already been notified?
safety_notes: Do not send volunteers into a possible hazard until location and danger level are confirmed.

suggested_next_coordinator_action.description: Ask the sender for exact location and immediate danger confirmation for: {summary}

limitations: This follow packet uses scenario-local evidence and does not contact emergency services.

resource_context.summary: The supply request has supporting scenario context, but quantities and drop-off details still need human confirmation: {summary}

findings.claim: Related scenario-local reports mention shelter supplies or infant-care items.

source_notes.label: Scenario-local supply reports
source_notes.note: Signals mention formula, diapers, chargers, blankets, or charging cables.

questions_for_human_verification: Where should supplies be dropped off?
Who is the coordinator contact at the drop-off point?
safety_notes: Route deliveries away from active hazards and avoid making medical or feeding advice claims.

suggested_next_coordinator_action.description: Prepare a supply run after the coordinator confirms quantity and drop-off contact for: {summary}

limitations: This packet does not verify inventory in real time.

volunteer_context.summary: The volunteer offer may be useful, but identity, contact, location, and safe assignment must be confirmed first: {summary}

findings.claim: Related scenario-local reports include volunteer capacity or availability.

source_notes.label: Scenario-local volunteer reports
source_notes.note: Signals mention available volunteers, vehicles, traffic support, or skilled help.

questions_for_human_verification: What is the volunteer contact number?
Where is the volunteer starting from?
Has the coordinator approved this assignment?
safety_notes: Do not assign volunteers into active hazard areas.

suggested_next_coordinator_action.description: Confirm identity, contact, location, and safe assignment boundaries for: {summary}

limitations: This packet does not verify credentials or perform background checks.

verify_rumor.summary: The information report should be treated as unverified until a primary or official source confirms it: {summary}

findings.claim: The report depends on rumor, secondhand information, or an explicit lack of confirmation.

source_notes.label: Scenario-local information reports
source_notes.note: Signals include rumor or confirmation language that should be checked before broadcast.

questions_for_human_verification: Can shelter staff or an official channel confirm it?
What exact wording should be shared after confirmation?
safety_notes: Do not broadcast unverified claims as fact.

suggested_next_coordinator_action.description: Check a primary or official source before sharing this update: {summary}

limitations: This mock packet does not perform live web or official-source checks.

duplicate_check.summary: This incident may overlap with another scenario-local report and should be reviewed before separate action: {summary}

findings.claim: Related scenario-local signals appear to describe the same need or location.

source_notes.label: Scenario-local related reports
source_notes.note: Multiple reports share overlapping location or need language.

questions_for_human_verification: Is this the same household, route, or shelter need as an existing incident?
Which incident should retain the latest evidence?
Would merging hide a distinct safety issue?
safety_notes: Do not merge away unique safety-critical details.

suggested_next_coordinator_action.description: Compare this packet against existing incident cards before merging: {summary}

limitations: This packet flags overlap but does not merge incidents.

fill_missing_info.summary: The incident still needs human-confirmed details before operational action: {summary}

findings.claim: The current incident has missing information that blocks confident action.

source_notes.label: Current incident packet
source_notes.note: The triage output already lists missing information for coordinator follow-up.

questions_for_human_verification: What exact missing detail should be confirmed first?
Does the answer change whether dispatch or escalation is safe?
safety_notes: Treat the packet as context until the coordinator confirms missing details.

suggested_next_coordinator_action.description: Use this packet to guide a callback for: {summary}

limitations: Follow results are context only and do not verify the incident automatically.
